recommended_steps: Formally secure and review Sarah Miller's report and all supporting documentation.
Confirm and formalize the temporary freeze on all payments to Oddity.
Preserve all electronic and physical data related to Oddity invoices and approvals.
Conduct a detailed interview with Sarah Miller to gather further specifics and context.
Obtain and review all contracts, purchase orders, and rate cards for Oddity.
Perform a forensic comparison of Oddity invoices, timesheets, and cost schedules for March-May 2025.
Interview William Taylor regarding his invoice approval process and the alleged discrepancies.
Review internal procurement and invoice approval policies and procedures.
Identify and secure all communications between William Taylor and Oddity.
Consult legal counsel regarding potential fraud and next steps.
evidence_request_list: Sarah Miller's detailed report and all supporting documentation (May invoice, timesheets, cost schedule).
All Oddity invoices, timesheets, and work logs for March, April, and May 2025.
All Oddity invoices, timesheets, and work logs for the preceding 6-12 months.
Approved contracts, purchase orders, and rate cards with Oddity.
Internal invoice approval records for Oddity, specifically William Taylor's approvals.
All email and communication records between William Taylor and Oddity.
All email and communication records between Sarah Miller and William Taylor regarding Oddity invoices.
Oddity personnel attendance records or site entry logs for relevant periods.
Company's procurement, vendor management, and invoice processing policies.
Financial records of payments made to Oddity.
